name: Aeronautics
summary: Guides covering the fundamentals of flight science and engineering, including aircraft design, aerodynamics, propulsion systems, and flight mechanics.

name: AI
summary: Guides covering Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning.

name: Archery
summary: Guides on learning archery, including bow handling, shooting techniques, aiming accuracy, form, and target practice fundamentals.

name: Astro-physics
summary: Guides exploring astrophysics concepts, including celestial objects, space phenomena, gravity, and the physical laws governing the universe.

name: Baking
summary: Guides on baking techniques, including bread, cakes, pastries, ingredient handling, oven use, and recipe fundamentals.

name: Biomedical Sciences
summary: Guides covering human biology and disease, including medical research methods, diagnostics, and healthcare science fundamentals.

name: Car
summary: Guides on cars, including how they work, types of vehicles, basic mechanics, driving systems, and automotive fundamentals.

name: Computer Architecture
summary: Guides explaining how computer systems are built, including CPUs, memory systems, instruction processing, and hardware design principles.

name: Cybersecurity
summary: Guides on protecting systems and data, including threat detection, network security, encryption, and safe digital practices.

name: DIY
summary: Guides for do-it-yourself projects, including home repairs, crafting, building, and practical hands-on creation without professional help.

name: Food Preservation
summary: Guides on preserving food, including freezing, drying, canning, fermenting, and extending shelf life safely.

name: Gardening & Plant Life
summary: Guides on gardening and plant care, including growing techniques, soil health, plant biology, and maintenance of gardens and greenery.

name: Mathematics
summary: Guides covering mathematical concepts, including arithmetic, algebra, geometry, problem-solving techniques, and logical reasoning.

name: Arithmetic
summary: Foundational number operations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, fractions, decimals, percentages, and ratios.

name: Pre-Algebra
summary: Bridging arithmetic and algebra including integers, expressions, basic equations, and introductory problem solving.

name: Algebra
summary: Core algebraic manipulation including expressions, equations, inequalities, factorisation, and quadratic functions.

name: Calculus
summary: Study of limits, derivatives, integrals, and continuous change with applications in science and engineering.

name: Logic & Reasoning
summary: Logical thinking, proof techniques, problem-solving strategies, and mathematical reasoning foundations.

name: Game Development
summary: Guides on all thinngs game development, including: 2D, 3D, board games, card games, table-top RPGs.

name: Geometry
summary: Shapes, space, angles, measurement, trigonometry foundations, and spatial reasoning.

name: Programming
summary: Guides on writing and understanding code, including programming languages, software development, debugging, and building applications.

name: Music
summary: Guides on music theory and practice, including rhythm, melody, composition, instruments, and understanding musical structure.

name: Unity
summary: Guides on developing 3D and 2D games, AR and VR applications, and animation and cinematics.

name: Vehicle Maintenance
summary: Guides on maintaining and repairing vehicles, including servicing, diagnostics, troubleshooting, and routine upkeep.

name: Probability
summary: Guides covering probability theory, random events, likelihood calculations, probability distributions, and reasoning under uncertainty.

name: Statistics
summary: Guides covering data collection, analysis, interpretation, visualisation, statistical testing, and drawing conclusions from data.

name: Vectors
summary: Guides covering vector mathematics, magnitude, direction, vector operations, coordinate systems, and applications in science and engineering.

name: Physics
summary: Guides covering the fundamental laws of nature, including motion, forces, energy, matter, waves, electricity, and modern physics.

name: Mechanics
summary: Guides covering motion, forces, momentum, energy, statics, dynamics, and the behaviour of physical systems.

name: Machine Learning
summary: Guides covering supervised and unsupervised learning, model training, feature engineering, evaluation techniques, and practical machine learning systems.

name: Simulation
summary: Guides covering the creation of simulations, modelling real-world systems, numerical methods, and virtual experimentation.

name: Computer Science
summary: Guides covering algorithms, computation, software systems, data structures, programming principles, and theoretical foundations of computing.

name: Data Structures
summary: Guides covering arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, hash tables, and efficient data organisation techniques.

name: 3D Modelling
summary: Guides covering the creation of three-dimensional assets, including modelling techniques, topology, sculpting, texturing, and optimisation.

name: Blender
summary: Guides covering the Blender software suite, including modelling, sculpting, animation, rendering, compositing, and asset creation workflows.

name: Animation
summary: Guides covering animation principles, character movement, rigging, keyframing, motion workflows, and visual storytelling.

name: 3D
summary: Guides covering three-dimensional graphics, environments, assets, rendering techniques, and interactive 3D applications.
